title: Unsupported: Blocked and non-blocking assignments to same variable
body:
---


Author Name: **Alex Solomatnikov**
Original Redmine Issue: 783 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2014-06-10


---

This was probably reported before, for this RTL:

```
    always_ff @(posedge clk) begin
       integer k;

       for( k=0; k<RATIO-1; k++ ) begin
          if( en[k] ) begin
             match_mask[k*`NUM_WAYS/RATIO +: `NUM_WAYS/RATIO] <= rdata_match_mask;
          end
       end
    end // always_ff @
    assign match_mask[(RATIO-1)*`NUM_WAYS/RATIO +: `NUM_WAYS/RATIO] = rdata_match_mask;

```

verilator errors out:

```
%Error-BLKANDNBLK: ....v:615: Unsupported: Blocked and non-blocking assignments to same variable: .....match_mask

```

Is this possible to fix? It's a pretty common pattern.

Of course, there is a workaround but it requires ugly extra code and all other tools (like VCS) can handle this.
